banner.title: Your privacy choices
banner.body: We use only strictly necessary cookies by default. With your consent, we may also use preferences, analytics, and marketing cookies. You can change this any time via the shield icon in the bottom-left.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.intro: Control how we use cookies. Strictly necessary cookies are always on so the site works.

rows.title: Strictly necessary
rows.desc: Required for core functionality and security. Cannot be disabled.

rows.title: Analytics
rows.desc: Anonymized usage stats to help us improve. Loaded only with consent.

rows.title: Marketing
rows.desc: Optional ad-related cookies. Off by default.
